nonBlockingIssues.description: VAL-LOOP-ATS-001 (ATS seeding independent of planner output) has no dedicated named test. Implicitly covered by pre-existing test.
VAL-LOOP-BROWSER-004/005 are covered only via inline comments referencing implicit coverage from other tests, not dedicated test cases.
Test fixture THIRD_PARTY_HOSTS (17 hosts) is a subset of implementation THIRD_PARTY_JOB_BOARD_HOSTS (30+ hosts). Some third-party hosts lack dedicated test coverage.
Canonical seed expansion skips already-canonical careers/listings pages. Low-risk edge case.
VAL-LOOP-BROWSER-005 lacks a dedicated named test; coverage relies on existing tests pointed to by comments.
ScoutObservationRecord types duplicated between contracts.ts (unstaged) and discovery-memory-store.ts (committed). Consistent with existing project pattern.
contracts.ts ScoutObservationRecord/ScoutObservationQuery type additions remain unstaged. Not blocking since discovery-memory-store.ts is self-contained.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Expand the *Ref naming convention guidance to apply to all code (not just tests/fixtures). Current wording: 'In tests/fixtures, avoid non-secret field names ending with Key'. Should be: 'In all code, avoid non-secret field names ending with Key (prefer *Ref/*Id) to prevent Droid-Shield false-positive commit blocking.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: wave2-memory-scout-observations worker applied the convention to production contracts.ts types but AGENTS.md only mentions tests/fixtures scope.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a 'verify existing implementation' branch to loop-browser-worker skill for cases where the implementation is already in place.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: wave2-browser-canonical-seed-expansion worker found implementation already existed and only added documentation comments.

rejectedObservations.observation: Canonical seed expansion for already-canonical careers pages not addressed.
rejectedObservations.reason: Low-risk edge case. Not a systemic issue.

rejectedObservations.observation: ScoutObservationRecord type duplication between contracts.ts and discovery-memory-store.ts.
rejectedObservations.reason: Consistent with existing project pattern. Non-blocking maintenance concern.
